query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_com_foto FROM players WHERE position = 'ATA' AND imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != 'NULL';
SELECT name, imageUrl FROM players WHERE position = 'ATA' ORDER BY name LIMIT 10;
